svg.title: RouteIQ — single request lifecycle
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow of a single API request through RouteIQ: API key check, cache hit check, request classification, model scoring, LLM call, response logging, and return to client.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the API key validation step do in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis cache check work in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('What happens on a cache hit in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does RouteIQ classify request complexity?')
g.text: Token count · task type · complexity score

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RouteIQ score and select the cheapest model?')
g.text: Rank by cost · check budget · select

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RouteIQ forward the request to the selected LLM?')
g.text: Forward with original prompt · stream back

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What cost data does RouteIQ log after each call?')
sendPrompt('What metadata does RouteIQ attach to the response?')
